Bismillah · Welcome

A house of trust for journeys that matter most.

S&R AL HAQ Travel & Tours Pvt Ltd is a multinational pilgrimage and tourism house, accredited and approved, dedicated to crafting journeys that honour both faith and curiosity. From your first step toward the Kaaba to your most distant horizon, we walk beside you.

IATA Approved

Internationally accredited agency with full ministry approvals.

Three Continents

Offices across Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, and the United Kingdom.

24/7 Support

Multilingual concierge available throughout your entire journey.

No Hidden Fees

Transparent, all-inclusive pricing — every cost shown upfront.

Our Services

A complete travel house, under one roof.

From sacred pilgrimage to corporate retreats, leisure escapes to long-haul visa processing — we handle the journey end-to-end.

/ 01

Umrah Packages

Economy to VIP, year-round, with hotels close to the Haram and full ground services in both holy cities.

View Packages →
/ 02

Hajj Pilgrimage

Government-approved Hajj operator with private group sizes, scholarly guidance, and Aziziya / Mina arrangements.

Inquire Now →
/ 03

Worldwide Tours

Curated leisure travel to Türkiye, Malaysia, Thailand, Europe, Dubai, and beyond — bespoke itineraries, halal-friendly.

Explore Destinations →
/ 04

Air Tickets

Domestic and international flight bookings with global carriers — best fares, flexible dates, group rates.

Get a Quote →
/ 05

Visa Processing

Saudi, Schengen, UK, USA, Türkiye, UAE — visa documentation, appointments, and consular services.

Apply Today →
/ 06

Group & Corporate

Tailored packages for families, mosques, schools, and corporate teams — incentive trips and conferences.

Plan With Us →
Where We Travel

Destinations that move the soul.

Beyond the holy cities, we curate experiences across continents — from minarets of Istanbul to the temples of Bali, the souks of Marrakesh to the shores of Phuket.

Years Trusted
Why Choose Us

Trust earned, journey by journey.

We are not a booking platform. We are a family-run, multinational pilgrimage house that treats every traveller as our guest — because for thirteen years, that is precisely what they have been.

01

Approved & Accredited

IATA-licensed with full Saudi Ministry of Hajj approval. Every package operates under verified, regulated frameworks.

02

Hotels Closest to the Haram

We negotiate directly with hotels in Makkah and Madina. Our guests stay closer to the Mosques — at lower cost.

03

Scholar-Led Guidance

Each group travels with a learned Mutawwif fluent in Urdu, Arabic, and English — for ritual clarity and spiritual depth.

04

End-to-End Service

From visa to return — flights, hotels, transport, ziyarat, meals, and concierge. One team, one contract, one promise.

Words From Our Guests

Stories of blessing & trust.

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
“

From the moment our visas arrived to the day we returned home, every detail was handled with care. The hotel in Makkah was a five-minute walk to the Haram — exactly as promised. May Allah reward S&R AL HAQ for their service.

FK
Faisal & Khadija
Umrah · Lahore, Pakistan
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
“

As an elderly traveller, I was nervous about Hajj. Their Mutawwif stayed with our group every step, helping with wheelchair arrangements and explaining each ritual patiently. A truly professional, deeply caring team.

AM
Abdul Majid
Hajj 2025 · Birmingham, UK
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
“

Our family booked a 12-day Türkiye and Umrah combo trip. The transitions were seamless, the guides spoke our language, and the whole arrangement felt premium without the premium markup. We will book again, insha'Allah.

SR
Sadia Rahman
Family Group · Karachi
